description: GET /random/2 — returns 2 randomly selected poems from the database.

body.title: Sonnet 18: Shall I compare thee to a summer's day?
body.author: William Shakespeare
lines: Shall I compare thee to a summer's day?
Thou art more lovely and more temperate:

body.title: Because I could not stop for Death
body.author: Emily Dickinson
lines: Because I could not stop for Death –
